title: Overtaking-enabled Eco-approach Control at Signalized Intersections for Connected and Automated Vehicles
authors: Haoxuan Dong; Weichao Zhuang; Guoyuan Wu; Zhaojian Li; Guodong Yin; Ziyou Song
method_family: Overtaking-enabled two-stage eco-approach / 允许超车的两阶段生态接近控制
concepts: 把信号控制替换为车辆级调度与控制。
减少急加减速、停车和能耗峰值。
把碰撞风险写成距离、时间间隔或屏障函数。
允许超车的两阶段生态接近控制

section_map.heading: I. INTRODUCTION
section_map.zh: 定位问题背景、研究缺口和为什么现有保守/非协同方法不足。
section_map.en: Frames the motivation, research gap, and limits of conservative or non-cooperative methods.

section_map.heading: II. INTERSECTIONCROSSINGSCENARIO AND
section_map.zh: 作为局部论证段落阅读，关注它如何服务主问题。
section_map.en: Read as a local argument and ask how it supports the main question.

section_map.heading: III. PROBLEMFORMULATION ANDCONTROLFRAMEWORK
section_map.zh: 把交通交互转写为状态、约束、目标或图结构，是精读时最应复现的部分。
section_map.en: Defines states, constraints, objectives, or graph structures; this is the section to reproduce carefully.

section_map.heading: IV. OVERTAKING-ENABLEDECO-APPROACH
section_map.zh: 作为局部论证段落阅读，关注它如何服务主问题。
section_map.en: Read as a local argument and ask how it supports the main question.

section_map.heading: V. SIMULATION ANDRESULTS
section_map.zh: 检验方法是否真的改善效率、安全或能耗；要关注基准是否公平。
section_map.en: Tests efficiency, safety, or energy claims; inspect whether baselines are fair.

textbook_study_path: 第一遍先读首页截图、摘要与引言，确认研究问题和场景假设。
第二遍沿着技术路线图复现模型变量、约束和求解器输入输出。
第三遍逐节阅读 section deep reading，对照 PDF 截图检查公式、图表和实验。
第四遍只站在审稿人视角重读实验，判断 baseline、公平性、消融和鲁棒性。
最后把博士 checklist 写成自己的复现实验或论文拓展计划。

section_deep_reading.heading: I. INTRODUCTION
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 建立研究动机：为什么传统信号控制、FCFS 或单车控制不足以处理该论文关注的交叉口协同问题。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Understand why the paper needs a new coordination method rather than a standard signal, FCFS, or single-vehicle controller.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 这一部分通常把痛点落到 Eco-approach + relaxed FIFO：既要提高效率，又要保持安全与在线可执行。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 精读时标出作者批判的 baseline、场景假设、交通参与者类型和隐含优化目标。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 作者指出的痛点是否真的需要新方法，还是可以由更强的优化器/更保守规则解决？

section_deep_reading.heading: II. INTERSECTIONCROSSINGSCENARIO AND
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 承接前后章节，补充局部定义、案例或实现细节。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Recover implementation details needed for reproduction.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 这类章节常常不是主贡献，但决定你能否真正复现方法。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 检查它是否给出了参数、伪代码、场景划分或实现细节。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 跳过该节会不会导致公式或实验无法复现？

section_deep_reading.heading: III. PROBLEMFORMULATION ANDCONTROLFRAMEWORK
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 把自然语言交通问题压缩为变量、状态、约束、目标函数或图结构。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Translate the traffic problem into variables, states, constraints, objectives, or graph relations.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 本节是复现论文的核心入口，应与公式“车道 DP 与速度 PMP 的两阶段目标 / Two-stage lane-DP and speed-PMP objective”一起读。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 逐项检查车辆状态、冲突关系、控制输入、时间/空间索引和安全阈值是否定义完整。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 这些建模假设在混合交通、通信延迟、感知误差和高密度车流下是否仍成立？

section_deep_reading.heading: IV. OVERTAKING-ENABLEDECO-APPROACH
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 解释算法如何把模型转化为可执行决策，并说明在线运行机制。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Trace how the paper turns the model into executable online decisions.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 第一阶段用动态规划选择车道和超车策略，打破传统 FIFO；第二阶段用 PMP/最优控制生成速度曲线。滚动时域使策略能对前车扰动重新规划。
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 画出输入、核心求解器、输出和安全检查接口，明确哪些步骤是优化、哪些是规则、哪些是学习。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 若算法某一步失败，论文有没有 fallback、重规划或安全过滤机制？

section_deep_reading.heading: V. SIMULATION ANDRESULTS
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_zh: 验证方法是否在公平基准下改善效率、安全、能耗或计算时间。
section_deep_reading.learning_goal_en: Check whether the claimed improvements are supported by fair baselines and meaningful metrics.
section_deep_reading.key_argument_zh: 实验应与论文声称的贡献闭环：Extensive simulations report average driving-cost improvements over constant-speed and regular eco-approach baselines.
section_deep_reading.technical_focus_zh: 重点追踪指标：驾驶成本、能耗、延误、停车次数、超车次数和计算耗时。 同时检查仿真平台、交通需求和随机性设置。
section_deep_reading.critical_question_zh: 实验是否只展示平均收益，还是覆盖了高密度、异常扰动和失败案例？

paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 先把作者的痛点翻译成一句博士问题：在信号交叉口中，放松 FIFO 队列并允许超车，能否同时降低能耗和延误？ 读这一段时不要急着接受动机，要追问传统 FCFS、信号灯或保守 MPC 为什么不足。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Turn the opening motivation into one doctoral-level question and test whether the paper truly needs a new method.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Assumption and setting / 假设与场景段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 把车辆类型、通信条件、路口类型和动力学假设列成表。该文的关键边界包括：车辆具备安全超车和变道能力。；信号相位和前车扰动可预测。；车道变化不会引入未建模的横向风险。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: List vehicle type, communication, intersection setting, and dynamics assumptions before reading the equations.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Model and notation / 模型与符号段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 围绕核心公式“车道 DP 与速度 PMP 的两阶段目标 / Two-stage lane-DP and speed-PMP objective”复写符号表，确认每个变量是决策变量、状态变量、参数还是约束阈值。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Rewrite the symbol table around the core formulation and classify variables as states, decisions, parameters, or constraints.

paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 把算法读成一条数据流：输入交通状态，执行 Receding-horizon two-stage control: dynamic-programming lane optimization followed by PMP speed trajectory optimization.，输出可执行通行/控制决策，并检查安全接口。
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Read the algorithm as a dataflow from traffic state to executable sequence/control decision, with explicit safety interfaces.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Experiment and evidence / 实验证据段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 不要只看作者报告的提升，要检查基准、公平性和指标。本文验证描述为：Extensive simulations report average driving-cost improvements over constant-speed and regular eco-approach baselines.
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Go beyond reported gains and inspect baselines, fairness, metrics, and computation time.

paragraph_walkthrough.stage: Reviewer synthesis / 审稿式总结段
paragraph_walkthrough.zh: 最后把贡献拆成可发表与需补强两部分。对你课题最直接的用途是：Supports the critique that FCFS/FIFO can be suboptimal and that speed smoothing should be coupled to sequencing.
paragraph_walkthrough.en: Separate publishable contribution from missing evidence, then connect the result to your own thesis architecture.

technical_route.content: 车辆状态、路径/车道、交通需求、信号或协同信息。
车道 DP 与速度 PMP 的两阶段目标 / Two-stage lane-DP and speed-PMP objective
Receding-horizon two-stage control: dynamic-programming lane optimization followed by PMP speed trajectory optimization.
Handles dynamic disturbance from preceding vehicles and lane-choice constraints.
Relaxes FIFO queuing at signalized intersections to reduce driving cost, energy consumption, and delay.
Extensive simulations report average driving-cost improvements over constant-speed and regular eco-approach baselines.

contribution_matrix.comment: 车道 DP 与速度 PMP 的两阶段目标 / Two-stage lane-DP and speed-PMP objective
Receding-horizon two-stage control: dynamic-programming lane optimization followed by PMP speed trajectory optimization.
Extensive simulations report average driving-cost improvements over constant-speed and regular eco-approach baselines.
Handles dynamic disturbance from preceding vehicles and lane-choice constraints.

contribution_matrix.dimension: 博士课题价值 / PhD relevance
contribution_matrix.comment: Supports the critique that FCFS/FIFO can be suboptimal and that speed smoothing should be coupled to sequencing.

doctoral_checklist: 能否独立重写核心公式：车道 DP 与速度 PMP 的两阶段目标 / Two-stage lane-DP and speed-PMP objective，并解释每个符号的物理意义？
能否画出输入-模型-算法-控制-验证的数据流图？
能否指出至少两个强假设，并说明它们在真实交通中何时失效？
能否复述实验基准是否公平，指标是否覆盖效率、安全、能耗和计算时间？
能否提出一个与自己 JSSP/RL/smoother 课题直接相连的拓展实验？

overview.background_zh: 这篇论文位于“Eco-approach + relaxed FIFO”方向。对你的 JSSP-based Intersection Management 课题，它回答的是高层调度、低层轨迹平滑、安全过滤或真实验证中的一个关键子问题：如何让车辆在路口少停、少冲突、少能耗，同时保持在线可执行。
overview.background_en: The paper belongs to the theme of Eco-approach + relaxed FIFO. For a JSSP-based intersection-management thesis, it illuminates one of the key layers: scheduling, smoothing, safety filtering, or real-world validation.
overview.pain_zh: Signalized intersection and overtaking/lane planning assumptions are outside the current fixed-route JSSP scope.
overview.pain_en: The main pain point is that efficient intersection coordination must handle combinatorial interactions, continuous vehicle dynamics, and safety constraints under online computation limits.
overview.core_question_zh: 在信号交叉口中，放松 FIFO 队列并允许超车，能否同时降低能耗和延误？
overview.core_question_en: Can relaxing FIFO with overtaking-enabled lane optimization reduce both energy use and delay at signalized intersections?
contributions: 方法贡献 (method contribution)：Receding-horizon two-stage control: dynamic-programming lane optimization followed by PMP speed trajectory optimization.
安全/避碰贡献 (safety contribution)：Handles dynamic disturbance from preceding vehicles and lane-choice constraints.
平滑/停止避免贡献 (smoothing contribution)：Relaxes FIFO queuing at signalized intersections to reduce driving cost, energy consumption, and delay.
创新力度评判 (reviewer judgement)：较强工程洞察：明确挑战 FIFO 保守性，对 JSSP 重排序动机非常有用。

methodology.model_name: 车道 DP 与速度 PMP 的两阶段目标 / Two-stage lane-DP and speed-PMP objective
symbols: 第 k 步车道选择
包含能耗、时间和平滑性
methodology.algorithm_zh: 第一阶段用动态规划选择车道和超车策略，打破传统 FIFO；第二阶段用 PMP/最优控制生成速度曲线。滚动时域使策略能对前车扰动重新规划。
methodology.algorithm_en: A receding-horizon controller first solves lane/overtaking choices with dynamic programming and then optimizes the speed profile with optimal-control tools.
methodology.stability_zh: 两阶段设计把组合车道决策和连续速度控制分开，实时性较好；但阶段间耦合不足时，车道选择可能导致后续速度优化不可行。
methodology.stability_en: The decomposition improves tractability, but lane decisions can create downstream feasibility issues if speed constraints are not anticipated.
assumptions: 车辆具备安全超车和变道能力。
信号相位和前车扰动可预测。
车道变化不会引入未建模的横向风险。

experiments.validation: Extensive simulations report average driving-cost improvements over constant-speed and regular eco-approach baselines.
experiments.baselines: 常速接近、普通生态接近、FIFO 策略和不允许超车的控制器。
experiments.metrics: 驾驶成本、能耗、延误、停车次数、超车次数和计算耗时。
experiments.ablation: 需比较禁用超车、禁用 DP 车道优化和不同滚动时域长度。

figure_table_cues.reading: 先确认输入、决策层、控制层和安全约束之间的数据流。
把综述分类映射到你的 scheduler、smoother、safety filter 和 evaluation 四层框架。
重点看平均值之外的密度变化、失败场景、计算时间和方差。

experiments.reviewer_reading: 阅读实验时不要只看平均值；应检查交通密度、车流方向、随机种子、失败案例和计算耗时。For doctoral reading, inspect density regimes, demand patterns, random seeds, failure cases, and computation time rather than only mean improvements.

limitations: 信号场景与无信号 AIM 不完全一致。
超车可行性强依赖道路几何和混合交通行为。
DP 状态空间随车道数和车辆数增长。
extensions: 把“允许超车”转化为 JSSP 中可交换相邻作业的局部搜索。
在无信号交叉口中研究 FIFO relaxation 的安全边界。
联合学习车道选择和排序，避免两阶段失配。
critique.project_use: Supports the critique that FCFS/FIFO can be suboptimal and that speed smoothing should be coupled to sequencing.

interactive.response_zh: 放松越强，潜在效率越高，但规则复杂度和可解释性风险增加。
interactive.response_en: Stronger FIFO relaxation can improve efficiency but raises rule complexity.

html_structure: 顶部固定 metadata bar：题名、作者、年份、主题、PDF 页数。
左侧目录/section navigator，右侧为五大精读模块。
公式卡片使用 <pre> 或 LaTeX block，紧跟符号表。
审稿人批注用 reviewer-note block，博士拓展用 research-idea list。
交互参数用 input[type=range] + canvas 曲线，打印 PDF 时隐藏交互控件但保留解释。
